name: Magnus Carlsen
title: GM
bio: Current world #1 and highest-rated player in history. Known for exceptional endgame technique and ability to win 'won' positions.

name: Garry Kasparov
title: GM
bio: Widely considered the greatest player of all time. Dominated chess for 20 years. Known for deep preparation and powerful attacks.

name: Bobby Fischer
title: GM
bio: American chess prodigy and 11th World Champion. Known for aggressive style and contributions to opening theory.

name: Mikhail Tal
title: GM
bio: The 'Magician from Riga'. Known for brilliant sacrifices and attacking chess. His games are legendary for creativity.

name: Jose Raul Capablanca
title: GM
bio: The 'Human Chess Machine'. Known for crystal-clear technique and making difficult positions look simple.

name: Anatoly Karpov
title: GM
bio: Master of positional chess and prophylaxis. Known for slowly squeezing opponents and winning without risk.

name: Viswanathan Anand
title: GM
bio: India's first grandmaster and five-time world champion. Known for speed and versatility in all phases of the game.

name: Vladimir Kramnik
title: GM
bio: Defeated Kasparov for the world title. Known for extremely solid play and deep strategic understanding.

name: Alexander Alekhine
title: GM
bio: Fourth World Champion known for deep, complex combinations. His attack on the king was legendary.

name: Emanuel Lasker
title: GM
bio: Held the world title for 27 years (longest reign). Master of practical play and psychological battles.

name: Wilhelm Steinitz
title: GM
bio: First official World Champion and father of positional chess. Revolutionized chess theory.

name: Paul Morphy
bio: The 'Pride and Sorrow of Chess'. Dominated the 1850s with beautiful attacking play based on rapid development.

name: Mikhail Botvinnik
title: GM
bio: The 'Patriarch of Soviet Chess'. Three-time world champion known for scientific approach and deep preparation.

name: Tigran Petrosian
title: GM
bio: 'Iron Tigran'. Known for incredible defensive skills and prophylactic thinking. Nearly impossible to beat.

name: Boris Spassky
title: GM
bio: 10th World Champion with elegant, universal style. Could play any type of position at the highest level.

name: Vassily Smyslov
title: GM
bio: Known for harmonious piece play and superb endgame technique. His style was described as 'natural'.

name: Aron Nimzowitsch
title: GM
bio: Pioneer of hypermodern chess and author of 'My System'. Revolutionized how we understand chess strategy.

name: Siegbert Tarrasch
title: GM
bio: 'Praeceptor Germaniae' (Teacher of Germany). Systematized chess principles and was a legendary teacher.

name: Akiba Rubinstein
title: GM
bio: One of the greatest players never to become world champion. His rook endgames are still studied today.

name: Samuel Reshevsky
title: GM
bio: Child prodigy who became one of America's strongest players. Known for time trouble and fighting spirit.

name: Bent Larsen
title: GM
bio: The Great Dane. Known for creative, unorthodox openings and aggressive play with either color.

name: David Bronstein
title: GM
bio: Drew the 1951 world championship match. Known for creative, imaginative play and his book on Zurich 1953.

name: Hikaru Nakamura
title: GM
bio: Top American player and popular chess streamer. Known for incredible speed and tactical abilities.

name: Fabiano Caruana
title: GM
bio: World #2 and World Championship challenger. Known for deep preparation and solid universal style.

name: Levon Aronian
title: GM
bio: One of the most creative players of his generation. Known for imaginative play and fighting spirit.

name: Maxime Vachier-Lagrave
title: GM
bio: France's strongest player ever. Known for aggressive style and expertise in the Najdorf Sicilian.

name: Wesley So
title: GM
bio: Fischer Random World Champion. Known for extremely solid, technical play and excellent endgame skills.

name: Ding Liren
title: GM
bio: China's first World Chess Champion. Known for solid, strategic play and incredible defensive skills.

name: Judit Polgar
title: GM
bio: Strongest female player in history. Defeated many world champions with her tactical, aggressive style.
